metadata.description: Free 50s product demo film. Edge TTS narration + ffmpeg + Playwright HTML overlays. Single brand.yaml drives palette/voice/scenes/captions.

plugins.name: demo-video
plugins.description: Run `/demo-video init` to scaffold the build into your project, edit brand.yaml, then `/demo-video build` produces final-framed.mp4 in ~75s. Voiceover via Edge TTS (free, no API key). Karaoke word-highlight captions via WordBoundary timing. Knowledge-graph + end-card scenes rendered from HTML + Playwright. Terminal scenes via VHS. Output 1920×1080 H.264, ~3 MB, ~50s.
